# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

---
_format_version: "1.1"
services:
- name: microservice1
  url: http://microservice1-api.local
  routes:
  - name: microservice1-route
    paths:
    - /microservice1

- name: microservice2
  url: http://microservice2-api.local
  routes:
  - name: microservice2-route
    paths:
    - /microservice2

upstreams:
- name: microservice1
  targets:
  - target: microservice1-api.local:80
    weight: 100
- name: microservice2
  targets:
  - target: microservice2-api.local:80
    weight: 100
